chain.thought: Explanation: Among players with last names starting with "F"—Farmer (1988-89), Favors (2011-present), Fesenko (2007-11), Fisher (2006-2007), Foster (1995-99), Fryer (1975-76), Fuller (1998-99), and Furlow (1979-80)—the earliest years for the Jazz are 1975-76 for Bernie Fryer. Therefore, Bernie Fryer was the first.

judge_thought: Explanation: The players with last names starting with "F" are Farmer (1988–89), Favors (2011–present), Fesenko (2007–11), Fisher (2006–2007), Foster (1995–99), Fryer (1975–76), Fuller (1998–99), and Furlow (1979–80). The earliest years for the Jazz among these is Bernie Fryer (1975–76), making him the first.
